stories.title: Middle East crisis live: Trump says US considering ‘winding down’ war; Iran fired missiles at Diego Garcia military base
stories.summary: Iran fired two ballistic missiles at the US-UK Diego Garcia base in the Indian Ocean but missed both shots, while Trump claims the US is 'getting very close to meeting our objectives' in winding down the war.

stories.title: UK allows US to use bases to strike Strait of Hormuz targets
stories.summary: UK approved expanded use of British bases for US strikes on Strait of Hormuz targets after accusing Iran of 'reckless strikes.'

stories.title: Drone strike near Iraqi intelligence headquarters in Baghdad kills officer
stories.summary: Drone strike by 'outlaw groups' killed one police officer near Iraqi intelligence headquarters in Baghdad.

stories.title: Iran war enters its fourth week with no clear end in sight
stories.summary: US-Israel war against Iran enters week four with Trump considering 'winding down' military efforts while lifting sanctions on Iranian oil stranded at sea to ease energy crisis.

stories.title: A wave of executions is feared in Iran after 3 young men were hanged this week
stories.summary: Iran executed three young men this week, sparking fears of a broader wave of executions amid the ongoing war.

stories.title: Iran says it will allow Japanese ships to transit the Strait of Hormuz
stories.summary: Iran announced it will allow Japanese ships to transit the Strait of Hormuz, notable since Japan sources 90% of its crude from the Middle East.

stories.title: Trump hints at wind down of war as US prepares to send more troops to Gulf
stories.summary: Trump hints at winding down the war while simultaneously sending three more amphibious assault ships to the Gulf and considering a Kharg Island takeover.

stories.title: Israel deliberately targeting medical facilities in south Lebanon, say health workers
stories.summary: Lebanese health workers say Israel is systematically targeting medical facilities in south Lebanon using double-tap strikes to make the area uninhabitable.

stories.title: US lifts sanctions on Iranian oil at sea in bid to ease supply pressures
stories.summary: Trump administration waived sanctions on Iranian oil purchases at sea for 30 days, bringing 140 million barrels to market to ease surging oil prices.

stories.title: Israel launches fresh strikes on Tehran and Beirut - as it happened
stories.summary: Kuwait's state oil firm reported drone attacks on its Mina Al-Ahmadi refinery causing fires, while Israel launched fresh strikes on Tehran and Beirut.

stories.title: Iran war live: US-Israel attack Natanz nuclear site; Diego Garcia targeted
stories.summary: US-Israel forces attacked Iran's Natanz nuclear site while Iran targeted Diego Garcia base, as Trump demands other nations protect the Strait of Hormuz from Iranian attacks.
